headline: Is DoorDash (DASH) Pricing In Too Much After Recent Share Price Swings?
summary: Wondering if DoorDash at around US$176.78 is offering fair value or asking too much of future expectations? This article breaks down what the current price may be implying. The stock has been volatile recently, with a 6.9% decline over the last 7 days, a 20.6% gain across 30 days, and returns of a 19.6% decline year to date and a 5.9% decline over the past year, all on top of a very large 3 year return and a 25.8% gain over 5 years. Some of the recent attention on DoorDash has centered...
